commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Needs maintainer/security rework plus contributor real behavior proof before merge; automation should not repair this PR until credential propagation policy and proof are resolved.; Needs attention: The patch expands credential propagation by copying OAuth refresh material across sibling agent stores without explicit opt-in.; Review finding: [P1] Restrict OAuth auth-profile sync to intended contexts — src/plugins/pr... (sha=4cdf6ac3fed626b172d6652486802e8456859ecf)
commands.review_summary:
The branch routes plugin-provider auth profile persistence through a shared sibling-sync helper, syncs Anthropic token and OAuth credentials to sibling agent dirs, adds auth-choice coverage, and imports DeepSeek into the provider contract registry.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR regression from source inspection: the PR predicate makes every OAuth credential sibling-syncable and the write path fans that into discovered sibling agent dirs. I did not run a live Anthropic setup-token flow in this read-only review, and the original gateway symptom is partly masked by current main read-through behavior.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/security rework plus contributor real behavior proof before merge; automation should not repair this PR until credential propagation policy and proof are resolved.

target.title: Fix Anthropic setup-token sibling auth sync
target.author: itslovepatel

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
